section1.label: SECTION 1: ASSESSMENT BY THE APPRAISEE AND APPRAISER
To be completed with mutual discussion by the Appraisee and Appraiser. Use additional sheets if required.

section1.question: A. Did you handle any responsibilities discussed during the last appraisal and mention your contribution in 2025.
B. Did you handle any responsibilities beyond your job description (multitasking) during the year?
C. Describe any factors which constrained your performance during the year.
D. Mention your key responsibilities for 2026 along with indicators:
E. List out the trainings and workshops attended during the year
F. List out the new training needs which are budgeted in 2026:
G. Can the staff be given additional responsibilities? If yes, please describe the nature of responsibilities.

fields.label: H. Whether the Appraisee has been/ being investigated under Safeguarding and/or Child Protection Policy norms during the year
I. Kindly attach your Job Description for 2026 duly signed by both Appraisee and Appraiser
J. Recommended for Promotion / Confirmation / Extension of contract (if applicable)?
